2662.iwh_en: It was narrated from Zirr ibn Hubaysh that he said: "Whoever recites the end of Surah al-Kahf at a particular hour of the night intending to rise for night prayer at that hour, he will indeed rise for it." 'Abda said: "We tried it and found it to be exactly so."
2662.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Zirr ibn Hubaysh bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca akhir Surah al-Kahf pada suatu waktu malam dengan niat bangun untuk shalat malam pada waktu itu, ia akan benar-benar bangun." 'Abdah berkata: "Kami mencobanya dan mendapatinya memang demikian."

2663.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites Surah al-Kahf on the night of Friday, a light shall illuminate for him from where he stands to the Ancient House (the Ka'bah)."
2663.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Sa'id al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca Surah al-Kahf pada malam Jumat, akan bersinar cahaya baginya dari tempatnya hingga Baitullah al-'Atiq (Ka'bah)."

2664.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khalid ibn Ma'dan that he said: "Recite al-Munjiya — which is Alif Lam Mim Tanzil (Surah al-Sajdah) — for it has reached me that a man used to recite it and nothing else, and he had many sins. It spread its wing over him and said: 'O Lord, forgive him, for he used to recite me abundantly.' And the Lord accepted its intercession for him and said: 'Record a good deed for him for every sin, and raise his rank by one degree.'"
2664.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khalid ibn Ma'dan bahwa ia berkata: "Bacalah al-Munjiyah — yaitu Alif Lam Mim Tanzil (Surah al-Sajdah) — karena telah sampai kepadaku bahwa seorang laki-laki selalu membacanya dan tidak membaca yang lain, dan ia banyak melakukan dosa. Surah itu membentangkan sayapnya atasnya dan berkata: 'Ya Tuhan, ampunilah dia, karena ia dahulu sering membacaku.' Maka Tuhan menerima syafa'atnya untuknya dan berfirman: 'Tuliskan baginya satu kebaikan untuk setiap dosa, dan angkat satu derajat baginya.'"

2665.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites Alif Lam Mim Tanzil (Surah al-Sajdah) and Tabarak alladhi biyadihi al-mulk (Surah al-Mulk), seventy good deeds shall be recorded for him, seventy sins expiated, and seventy ranks raised."
2665.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca Alif Lam Mim Tanzil (Surah al-Sajdah) dan Tabaraka alladzi biyadihil-mulk (Surah al-Mulk), akan dicatat baginya tujuh puluh kebaikan, dihapus tujuh puluh keburukan, dan diangkat tujuh puluh derajat."

2666.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khalid ibn Ma'dan that he said: "'Alif Lam Tanzil al-Kitab la rayba fihi min rabb al-'alamin' (Surah al-Sajdah: 1-2) will dispute on behalf of its companion in the grave, saying: 'O Allah, if I am from Your Book, then grant me intercession for him; and if I am not from Your Book, then erase me from it.' It will be like a bird spreading its wing over him, and its intercession shall be accepted — protecting him from the punishment of the grave. And Surah al-Mulk has the same virtue." Khalid never slept without reciting both surahs.
2666.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khalid ibn Ma'dan bahwa ia berkata: "'Alif Lam Tanzilul-Kitabi la rayba fihi min rabbil-'alamin' (Surah al-Sajdah: 1-2) akan membela pemiliknya di dalam kubur, seraya berkata: 'Ya Allah, jika aku bagian dari Kitab-Mu, maka syafa'atkanlah aku untuknya; dan jika aku bukan dari Kitab-Mu, maka hapuslah aku darinya.' Ia akan seperti seekor burung yang membentangkan sayapnya atasnya, dan syafa'atnya diterima — melindunginya dari azab kubur. Dan Surah al-Mulk memiliki keutamaan yang sama." Khalid tidak pernah tidur tanpa membaca kedua surah itu.

2667.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ "would not sleep until he recited Tanzil (Surah al-Sajdah) and Tabarak (Surah al-Mulk)."
2667.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ "tidak tidur hingga membaca Tanzil (Surah al-Sajdah) dan Tabaraka (Surah al-Mulk)."

2668.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tawus that he said: "The two of them (Surah al-Sajdah and Surah al-Mulk) are preferred over every other surah in the Quran by sixty good deeds."
2668.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Thawus bahwa ia berkata: "Keduanya (Surah al-Sajdah dan Surah al-Mulk) diutamakan atas setiap surah lain dalam Al-Qur'an dengan enam puluh kebaikan."

2669.iwh_en: It was narrated from Murra that he said: "A man in his grave was approached from the side of his grave, and a surah of the Quran with thirty verses began disputing on his behalf." He continued: "Masruq and I looked and found no surah in the Quran with thirty verses except Tabarak (Surah al-Mulk)."
2669.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Murrah bahwa ia berkata: "Seorang laki-laki di kuburannya didatangi dari sisi kuburannya, lalu sebuah surah dari Al-Qur'an yang terdiri dari tiga puluh ayat mulai membela dirinya." Ia melanjutkan: "Aku dan Masruq mencari dan tidak menemukan dalam Al-Qur'an surah yang terdiri dari tiga puluh ayat selain Tabaraka (Surah al-Mulk)."

2670.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayra (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Allah the Blessed and Exalted recited Ta-Ha and Ya-Sin a thousand years before He created the heavens and the earth. When the angels heard the Quran they said: 'Blessed be the ummah upon whom this will be revealed, blessed be the hearts that carry it, and blessed be the tongues that speak it.'"
2670.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurayrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Allah yang Maha Berkah lagi Maha Tinggi membaca Ta-Ha dan Ya-Sin seribu tahun sebelum Ia menciptakan langit dan bumi. Ketika para malaikat mendengar Al-Qur'an, mereka berkata: 'Berbahagialah umat yang kepadanya ini diturunkan, berbahagialah hati-hati yang membawanya, dan berbahagialah lidah-lidah yang mengucapkannya.'"

2671.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan al-Basri that he said: "Whoever recites Ya-Sin in a night seeking Allah's pleasure, he shall be forgiven. And it has reached me that it is equivalent to the entire Quran."
2671.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan al-Basri bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca Ya-Sin pada suatu malam karena mengharap keridhaan Allah, ia akan diampuni. Dan telah sampai kepadaku bahwa ia setara dengan seluruh Al-Qur'an."

2672.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Everything has a heart, and the heart of the Quran is Ya-Sin. Whoever recites it, it is as if he has recited the Quran ten times."
2672.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Segala sesuatu memiliki hati, dan hati Al-Qur'an adalah Ya-Sin. Barangsiapa membacanya, seolah-olah ia telah membaca Al-Qur'an sebanyak sepuluh kali."

2673.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayra (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever recites Ya-Sin in a night seeking Allah's pleasure, he shall be forgiven in that night."
2673.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurayrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa membaca Ya-Sin pada suatu malam karena mengharap wajah Allah, ia akan diampuni pada malam itu."

2674.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Ata' ibn Abi Rabah in a mursal chain that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever recites Ya-Sin at the beginning of the day, his needs shall be fulfilled."
2674.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan secara mursal dari 'Atha' ibn Abi Rabah bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa membaca Ya-Sin di awal siang, kebutuhan-kebutuhannya akan terpenuhi."

2675.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites Ya-Sin when he rises in the morning, he shall be granted ease throughout his day until evening. And whoever recites it at the start of his night, he shall be granted ease throughout his night until morning."
2675.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca Ya-Sin ketika pagi, ia akan diberi kemudahan sepanjang harinya hingga sore. Dan barangsiapa membacanya di awal malamnya, ia akan diberi kemudahan sepanjang malamnya hingga pagi."

2676.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Abdullah ibn 'Isa who said: "I have been informed that whoever recites Ha-Mim al-Dukhan (Surah al-Dukhan) on the night of Friday with faith and conviction, he shall awaken forgiven."
2676.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Abdullah ibn 'Isa yang berkata: "Telah diberitahukan kepadaku bahwa barangsiapa membaca Ha-Mim al-Dukhan (Surah al-Dukhan) pada malam Jumat dengan iman dan keyakinan, ia akan bangun pagi dalam keadaan diampuni."

2677.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Rafi' that he said: "Whoever recites Ha-Mim al-Dukhan on the night of Friday, he shall awaken forgiven and shall be wedded to the wide-eyed maidens of Paradise."
2677.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Rafi' bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca Ha-Mim al-Dukhan pada malam Jumat, ia akan bangun pagi dalam keadaan diampuni dan dinikahkan dengan bidadari bermata lebar di surga."

2678.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn Ibrahim that he said: "The Ha-Mim surahs used to be called 'the brides.'"
2678.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn Ibrahim bahwa ia berkata: "Surah-surah Ha-Mim dahulu disebut 'pengantin-pengantin.'"

2679.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan al-Basri that he said: "Whoever recites the last three verses of Surah al-Hashr when he rises in the morning, and then dies that day, he shall be stamped with the seal of the martyrs. And if he recites them in the evening and then dies that night, he shall be stamped with the seal of the martyrs."
2679.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan al-Basri bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca tiga ayat terakhir Surah al-Hasyr ketika pagi, kemudian meninggal pada hari itu, ia akan dicap dengan cap para syuhada. Dan jika ia membacanya di sore hari kemudian meninggal pada malam itu, ia akan dicap dengan cap para syuhada."

2680.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khalid ibn Ma'dan in a mursal chain that the Prophet ﷺ "used to recite the Musabbihat (the surahs beginning with glorification of Allah) before sleeping, and would say: 'Among them is a verse that is equivalent to a thousand verses.'"
2680.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan secara mursal dari Khalid ibn Ma'dan bahwa Nabi ﷺ "dahulu membaca al-Musabbihat (surah-surah yang dimulai dengan tasbih) sebelum tidur, dan bersabda: 'Di dalamnya ada sebuah ayat yang setara dengan seribu ayat.'"

2681.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ma'qil ibn Yasar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Whoever says when he rises in the morning: 'A'udhu billah al-sami' al-'alim min al-shaytan al-rajim' (I seek refuge with Allah the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing, from the accursed devil), followed by the last three verses of Surah al-Hashr — Allah shall assign seventy thousand angels to pray for him until evening. And if he says them in the evening, the same shall apply until morning."
2681.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ma'qil ibn Yasar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa mengucapkan ketika pagi: 'A'udzu billahis-sami'il-'alim minasy-syaithanir-rajim' (Aku berlindung kepada Allah Yang Maha Mendengar lagi Maha Mengetahui dari setan yang terkutuk), kemudian (membaca) tiga ayat terakhir Surah al-Hasyr — Allah akan menyiapkan tujuh puluh ribu malaikat yang bershalawat untuknya hingga sore. Dan jika ia mengucapkannya di sore hari, maka hal yang sama berlaku hingga pagi."

2682.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Hasan Muhajir that he said: "A man came to Kufa in the time of Ziyad, and I heard him narrating that he had been with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a journey — his knee was touching or near the Prophet's knee ﷺ — and the Prophet ﷺ heard a man reciting 'Say: O you disbelievers' (Surah al-Kafirun) and said: 'He has declared himself free of polytheism.' Then he heard another man reciting 'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas) and said: 'He has been forgiven.'"
2682.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Hasan Muhajir bahwa ia berkata: "Seorang laki-laki datang ke Kufah pada masa Ziyad, dan aku mendengarnya menceritakan bahwa ia pernah bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dalam suatu perjalanan — lututnya menyentuh atau dekat dengan lutut Nabi ﷺ — dan Nabi ﷺ mendengar seorang laki-laki membaca 'Qul ya ayyuhal-kafirun' (Surah al-Kafirun) lalu bersabda: 'Ia telah menyatakan dirinya bebas dari kemusyrikan.' Kemudian beliau mendengar laki-laki lain membaca 'Qul huwallahu ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas) dan bersabda: 'Ia telah diampuni.'"

2683.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nawfal ibn Mu'awiya (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: "What brings you here?" He said: "I came so that you would teach me something to say before I sleep." The Prophet ﷺ said: "When you take to your bed, recite 'Say: O you disbelievers' (Surah al-Kafirun), then sleep upon its conclusion — for it is a declaration of freedom from polytheism."
2683.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nawfal ibn Mu'awiyah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda kepadanya: "Apa yang membawamu kemari?" Ia berkata: "Aku datang agar engkau mengajarkanku sesuatu yang kuucapkan sebelum tidur." Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Jika kamu berbaring, bacalah 'Qul ya ayyuhal-kafirun' (Surah al-Kafirun), kemudian tidurlah setelah mengakhirinya — karena ia adalah pernyataan kebebasan dari kemusyrikan."

2684.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nawf al-Bika'li that he said: "Allah divided the Quran into three portions, and He made 'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas) one third of the Quran."
2684.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nawf al-Bika'li bahwa ia berkata: "Allah membagi Al-Qur'an menjadi tiga bagian, dan Ia menjadikan 'Qul Huwallahu Ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas) sepertiga Al-Qur'an."

2685.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib in a mursal chain that the Prophet of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever recites 'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas) ten times, a palace shall be built for him in Paradise. Whoever recites it twenty times, two palaces shall be built for him. And whoever recites it thirty times, three palaces shall be built for him." 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (may Allah be pleased with him) said: "By Allah, O Messenger of Allah, then our palaces in Paradise shall be many." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Allah is more vast than that." — Abu Muhammad said: "Abu 'Aqil is Zuhra ibn Ma'bad, and they claimed he was among the abdal."
2685.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan secara mursal dari Sa'id ibn al-Musayyib bahwa Nabi Allah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa membaca 'Qul Huwallahu Ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas) sepuluh kali, akan dibangunkan baginya sebuah istana di surga. Barangsiapa membacanya dua puluh kali, akan dibangunkan dua istana. Dan barangsiapa membacanya tiga puluh kali, akan dibangunkan tiga istana." 'Umar ibn al-Khattab (radhiyallahu 'anhu) berkata: "Demi Allah, wahai Rasulullah, kalau begitu istana-istana kita di surga akan banyak sekali." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Allah lebih luas dari itu." — Abu Muhammad berkata: "Abu 'Aqil adalah Zuhrah ibn Ma'bad, dan mereka menyatakan bahwa ia termasuk golongan abdal."

2686.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Utba ibn Damra ibn Habib that his father used to "follow every surah he recited with 'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas)."
2686.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Utbah ibn Damrah ibn Habib bahwa ayahnya selalu "mengakhiri setiap surah yang dibacanya dengan 'Qul Huwallahu Ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas)."

2687.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Can any of you not recite a third of the Quran in a night?" The Companions said: "We are more incapable and weaker than that." He said: "Allah has divided the Quran into three parts, and He made 'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas) one third of the Quran."
2687.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Apakah salah seorang di antara kalian tidak mampu membaca sepertiga Al-Qur'an dalam satu malam?" Para sahabat berkata: "Kami lebih lemah dan tidak sanggup dari itu." Beliau bersabda: "Allah membagi Al-Qur'an menjadi tiga bagian, dan Ia menjadikan 'Qul Huwallahu Ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas) sepertiga Al-Qur'an."

2688.iwh_en: It was narrated from Humayd ibn 'Abd al-Rahman that Abu Hurayra (may Allah be pleased with him) used to say: "'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas) is equivalent to one third of the Quran."
2688.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Humayd ibn 'Abd al-Rahman bahwa Abu Hurayrah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) biasa berkata: "'Qul Huwallahu Ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas) setara dengan sepertiga Al-Qur'an."

2689.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas) is equivalent to one third of the Quran." And another chain also narrates the same from 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him).
2689.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "'Qul Huwallahu Ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas) setara dengan sepertiga Al-Qur'an." Dan diriwayatkan pula dengan sanad lain dari 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) yang semakna.

2690.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man said: "By Allah, I truly love this surah — 'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas)." The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Your love for it has admitted you into Paradise."
2690.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki berkata: "Demi Allah, sungguh aku mencintai surah ini — 'Qul Huwallahu Ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas)." Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Kecintaanmu padanya telah memasukkanmu ke surga."

2691.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Humayd ibn 'Abd al-Rahman (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about 'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas), and he said: "It is one third of the Quran, or equivalent to it."
2691.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari ibunda Humayd ibn 'Abd al-Rahman (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang 'Qul Huwallahu Ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas), lalu beliau bersabda: "Ia adalah sepertiga Al-Qur'an, atau setara dengannya."

2692.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Ayyub (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to us: 'Can any of you not recite a third of the Quran in a night?' We feared he was imposing on us something we could not accomplish, so we said nothing until he repeated it three times. Then he said: 'Can any of you not recite "Say: He is Allah, One, Allah the Eternal" (Surah al-Ikhlas)?'"
2692.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Ayyub (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada kami: 'Apakah salah seorang di antara kalian tidak mampu membaca sepertiga Al-Qur'an dalam satu malam?' Kami khawatir beliau menginginkan dari kami sesuatu yang tidak mampu kami lakukan, maka kami tidak menjawab apapun sampai beliau mengulanginya tiga kali. Kemudian beliau bersabda: 'Apakah salah seorang di antara kalian tidak mampu membaca "Qul Huwallahu Ahad, Allahus-Shamad" (Surah al-Ikhlas)?'"

2693.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever recites 'Say: He is Allah, One' (Surah al-Ikhlas) fifty times, Allah shall forgive his sins of fifty years."
2693.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa membaca 'Qul Huwallahu Ahad' (Surah al-Ikhlas) lima puluh kali, Allah akan mengampuni dosa-dosanya selama lima puluh tahun."

2694.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Uqba ibn 'Amir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "I held onto the foot of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, teach me Surah Hud and Surah Yusuf.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to me: 'O 'Uqba, you shall not recite any surah from the Quran more beloved to Allah and more reaching to Him than Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of the Daybreak (Surah al-Falaq).'" Yazid said: "So Abu 'Imran never abandoned it — he would always recite it in the Maghrib prayer."
2694.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Uqbah ibn 'Amir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku memegang kaki Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, ajarkan kepadaku Surah Hud dan Surah Yusuf.' Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadaku: 'Wahai 'Uqbah, engkau tidak akan membaca surah apapun dari Al-Qur'an yang lebih dicintai Allah dan lebih sampai kepada-Nya daripada Qul a'udzu birabbi al-falaq (Surah al-Falaq).'" Yazid berkata: "Maka Abu 'Imran tidak pernah meninggalkannya — ia selalu membacanya dalam shalat Maghrib."

2695.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Uqba ibn 'Amir (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "I walked with the Prophet ﷺ, and he said to me: 'Say, O 'Uqba.' I asked: 'What shall I say?' He remained silent, then said again: 'O 'Uqba, say.' I asked: 'What shall I say?' He said: 'Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of the Daybreak (Surah al-Falaq).' I recited it to its end, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ then said: 'No one who asks has ever asked, and no one who seeks refuge has ever sought refuge, with anything like it.'"
2695.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Uqbah ibn 'Amir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku berjalan bersama Nabi ﷺ, lalu beliau berkata kepadaku: 'Katakanlah, wahai 'Uqbah.' Aku bertanya: 'Apa yang harus aku katakan?' Beliau diam, kemudian berkata lagi: 'Wahai 'Uqbah, katakanlah.' Aku bertanya: 'Apa yang harus aku katakan?' Beliau bersabda: 'Katakanlah: A'udzu birabbi al-falaq (Surah al-Falaq).' Aku membacanya hingga akhir, lalu Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada orang yang memohon pernah memohon, dan tidak ada orang yang berlindung pernah berlindung, dengan sesuatu yang seperti ini.'"

2696.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Uqba ibn 'Amir (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Verses have been revealed to me the like of which has never been seen — or the like of which has not been seen" — meaning the two surahs of seeking refuge (al-Mu'awwidhatan, Surah al-Falaq and Surah al-Nas)."
2696.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Uqbah ibn 'Amir (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Telah diturunkan kepadaku ayat-ayat yang belum pernah terlihat yang sepertinya — atau belum pernah dilihat yang sepertinya" — yakni dua surah perlindungan (al-Mu'awwidhatan, Surah al-Falaq dan Surah al-Nas)."

2697.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tamim al-Dari (may Allah be pleased with him) through two chains that he said: "Whoever recites ten verses in a night shall not be recorded among the heedless."
2697.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tamim al-Dari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) melalui dua sanad bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca sepuluh ayat pada suatu malam, ia tidak akan dicatat sebagai orang yang lalai."

2698.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tamim al-Dari and Fadala ibn 'Ubayd (may Allah be pleased with them both) that they said: "Whoever recites ten verses in a night shall be recorded among those who pray (the night prayer)."
2698.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tamim al-Dari dan Fadhalah ibn 'Ubayd (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa keduanya berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca sepuluh ayat pada suatu malam, ia akan dicatat sebagai orang yang shalat (malam)."

2699.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites ten verses in a night shall not be recorded among the heedless."
2699.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca sepuluh ayat pada suatu malam, ia tidak akan dicatat sebagai orang yang lalai."

2700.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites ten verses in a night shall not be recorded among the heedless."
2700.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca sepuluh ayat pada suatu malam, ia tidak akan dicatat sebagai orang yang lalai."

2701.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites fifty verses in a night shall not be recorded among the heedless."
2701.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca lima puluh ayat pada suatu malam, ia tidak akan dicatat sebagai orang yang lalai."

2702.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tamim al-Dari and Fadala ibn 'Ubayd (may Allah be pleased with them both) that they said: "Whoever recites fifty verses in a night shall be recorded among the mindful."
2702.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tamim al-Dari dan Fadhalah ibn 'Ubayd (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa keduanya berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca lima puluh ayat pada suatu malam, ia akan dicatat sebagai orang yang menjaga (Al-Qur'an)."

2703.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Whoever recites one hundred verses in a night shall not be recorded among the heedless." — Abu Muhammad said: "Some say in place of Salim: Rashid ibn Sa'd."
2703.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa membaca seratus ayat pada suatu malam, ia tidak akan dicatat sebagai orang yang lalai." — Abu Muhammad berkata: "Sebagian menyebut sebagai ganti Salim: Rasyid ibn Sa'd."

2704.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn 'Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites one hundred verses in a night shall be recorded among the devoutly obedient."
2704.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn 'Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca seratus ayat pada suatu malam, ia akan dicatat sebagai orang yang taat dan patuh."

2705.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tamim al-Dari (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever recites one hundred verses in a night, the standing of one full night's prayer shall be recorded for him."
2705.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tamim al-Dari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa membaca seratus ayat pada suatu malam, akan dicatat baginya pahala berdiri dalam shalat semalam penuh."

2706.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites one hundred verses shall be recorded among the devoutly obedient."
2706.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca seratus ayat, ia akan dicatat sebagai orang yang taat dan patuh."

2707.iwh_en: It was narrated from Tamim al-Dari and Fadala ibn 'Ubayd (may Allah be pleased with them both) that they said: "Whoever recites one hundred verses in a night shall be recorded among the devoutly obedient."
2707.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tamim al-Dari dan Fadhalah ibn 'Ubayd (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa keduanya berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca seratus ayat pada suatu malam, ia akan dicatat sebagai orang yang taat dan patuh."

2708.iwh_en: It was narrated from 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites one hundred verses in a night shall be recorded among the devoutly obedient."
2708.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari 'Abdullah ibn Mas'ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca seratus ayat pada suatu malam, ia akan dicatat sebagai orang yang taat dan patuh."

2709.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Umama (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites one hundred verses shall not be recorded among the heedless."
2709.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Umamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca seratus ayat, ia tidak akan dicatat sebagai orang yang lalai."

2710.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Umama (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: "Whoever recites two hundred verses shall be recorded among the devoutly obedient."
2710.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Umamah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: "Barangsiapa membaca dua ratus ayat, ia akan dicatat sebagai orang yang taat dan patuh."

2711.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu al-Darda' (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Whoever recites two hundred verses in a night shall be recorded among the devoutly obedient."
2711.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu al-Darda' (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa membaca dua ratus ayat pada suatu malam, ia akan dicatat sebagai orang yang taat dan patuh."
